description: The three tightest gaps (m=1469: 0.237, m=638: 0.258, m=34: 0.271) were computed at N=15 Chebyshev collocation only, which gives ~2-3 decimal accuracy. The N=40 FP64 computation was performed only for the 168 primes p ≤ 1000, not for composite moduli. To provide convergence data and rigorous enclosures, we need to re-run m=1469, 638, and 34 at N=20, 25, 30, 35, 40 with FP64 and compare the gap values across resolutions. The finding already notes the N=15 limitation (line 54) but the requested convergence study has not been performed yet.
action_taken: The three tightest gaps (m=1469: 0.237, m=638: 0.258, m=34: 0.271) were computed at N=15 Chebyshev collocation only, which gives ~2-3 decimal accuracy. The N=40 FP64 computation was performed only for the 168 primes p ≤ 1000, not for composite moduli. To provide convergence data and rigorous enclosures, we need to re-run m=1469, 638, and 34 at N=20, 25, 30, 35, 40 with FP64 and compare the gap values across resolutions. The finding already notes the N=15 limitation (line 54) but the requested convergence study has not been performed yet.
